summary: Every legal input is one fixed 8 by 8 board, and locating the rook plus scanning its four rays examines only a constant maximum of 64 board cells.

workload_bound.source_constraint: board always has exactly eight rows and eight columns

replacement_checks.evidence: The board search and four rook rays cannot inspect more than the fixed 64 cells.
Authored cases cover blockers, edge placement, immediate pawns, empty rays, and four-direction captures.
